selections.name: Donatello (NZ)
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class from Randwick Bm72 to a Maiden. Elite trainer/jockey combo with Waller and Berry. Clear top pick on class figures.

selections.name: Scoop The Pool
selections.reason: Solid 2nd at Newcastle last start on a slow track. Deep into his prep and has strong claims to break through.

selections.name: Master Of War
selections.reason: Consistent type who handles rain-affected going well. Placed 3rd at Nowra last start and should be competitive again.

selections.name: Sharbino
selections.reason: Improved 3rd at Kembla Grange last start. Light weight and can sneak into the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Chaithnia
danger_horse.reason: Winkers go on today. Showed ability two starts back and draws the inside.

selections.name: Rising Revolution
selections.reason: Resuming from a lengthy break but showed promise in first prep. Lugging bit goes on and draws perfectly in barrier 1.

selections.name: Stardust Memories
selections.reason: Waterhouse/Bott runner who was well supported on debut. Better for the experience and can improve sharply.

selections.name: Ho Aloha
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten at Nowra on a heavy track last start. Fit and handles the conditions.

selections.name: Mind Ya Bizz
selections.reason: Resuming. Placed first-up previously and has trialled well. Tommy Berry takes the ride.

danger_horse.name: Tszinsi
danger_horse.reason: Fitter for the first-up run and draws well. Can show improvement.

selections.name: Yeszem
selections.reason: Faded late last start but form prior was excellent, including a close 2nd at Kembla. Finds her right race here.

selections.name: Heard Of Him (NZ)
selections.reason: Well supported on debut when 4th at Bathurst. Fitter now and the step up in trip looks ideal.

selections.name: Yes Arnie
selections.reason: Consistent form and boxed on well at Taree last start. Gets a soft run from the inside gate.

selections.name: Jonson (NZ)
selections.reason: Third-up today. Placed at Newcastle last start and is nearing a win, though the wide draw is a slight concern.

danger_horse.name: Kuwait
danger_horse.reason: Third-up and gets a better setup today. Capable of surprising at odds.

selections.name: Obsidian Dream (NZ)
selections.reason: Broke through for a deserved win here last start in heavy going. Consistent type who can go on with it now.

selections.name: Hammoon Heroine (GB)
selections.reason: Third-up today. Won well fresh and wasn't far away at Canberra last start. Can control the pace.

selections.name: Call Me Mojo
selections.reason: Struck trouble last start. Won well fresh and can bounce back with a cleaner run.

selections.name: Abandonment (NZ)
selections.reason: Resuming from a long break but has trialled twice. Form in NZ was solid and commands respect.

danger_horse.name: Clear Blue Day
danger_horse.reason: Sound 3rd here last start. Draws the inside and can feature in the finish.

selections.name: Reign 'Em In
selections.reason: Led and faded late at Muswellbrook but form prior was strong. Gets a great chance to break through here.

selections.name: Cosmic Order
selections.reason: Well supported on debut when 6th at Newcastle. Better for the experience and draws the pole.

selections.name: Monocru
selections.reason: Had excuses last start. Placed first-up and is worth another chance in this field.

selections.name: Majestic Legend
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed ability last prep and has trialled fairly. Can run into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Radicals
danger_horse.reason: First starter for the Pride stable. Trialled okay and market watch is advised.

selections.name: Rustemo
selections.reason: Impressive winner at Scone last start when racing on the speed. Back in great shape and is the one to beat.

selections.name: Sapling
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Solid 4th at Gosford last start in a tougher grade. Looks well placed.

selections.name: Koritsi
selections.reason: Won well at Taree on a heavy track last start. Consistent form and can handle the conditions.

selections.name: Turning Circle
selections.reason: Due for a change of luck after a solid 5th at Newcastle. Capable of figuring in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Hunter One
danger_horse.reason: Fought on well for 3rd at Kembla Grange last start. Wide draw is a negative but has claims.

selections.name: Divine Vicky
selections.reason: Third-up today. Drops in grade after a solid 4th at Wyong. Leading hope in this easier contest.

selections.name: Prinzerro
selections.reason: Faded late at Newcastle last start but gets a better setup today from the inside gate.

selections.name: Light Infantry
selections.reason: Won well at Parkes last start. Can handle the rise in class and is in excellent form.

selections.name: Still Alice
selections.reason: First-up. Has trialled well and is capable on her day. Keep safe fresh.

danger_horse.name: Magnolia Jewel
danger_horse.reason: Won nicely at Port Macquarie last start. Can keep the momentum going despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Classic Deel
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to win. Solid 4th at Newcastle last start and should appreciate this suitable contest.

selections.name: Koning
selections.reason: Second-up. Improver over the extra trip today. Wide draw is the main concern but has the class.

selections.name: Marsabit (IRE)
selections.reason: Drops in grade after racing in a Bm78 at Rosehill. Terrific chance on the quick back-up.

selections.name: Just Shane
selections.reason: Solid 3rd at Queanbeyan last start. Gets a jockey change and is among the top chances.

danger_horse.name: Coto De Caza (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Second-up. Needed the run fresh but has the ability to bounce back if he finds his best form.
